description_long: This is a small, round stone cabin with a wide, conical thatched roof that extends well beyond the walls, providing ample shade and protection from rain. The lower portion of the structure is constructed from irregularly shaped stones, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance, while the upper section is capped with a dark wooden band beneath the roof. The front features a wooden door with a metal handle and a small lantern hanging beside it, adding a welcoming touch. Windows are present on at least two sides, each with a wooden frame and crossbars, allowing natural light to enter the interior. The roof is made of yellowish, straw-like material arranged in a radial pattern, typical of traditional thatched construction. Decorative stones line the base of the cabin, enhancing its quaint, rural charm.
description: A round stone cabin with a wide, conical thatched roof, wooden door, and small windows, exuding rustic charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden door, metal handle, and a lantern beside the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view with a single window featuring a wooden frame and crossbars, no door visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with no windows or doors visible, only the stone wall and thatched roof.
description_view_3: Angled view showing a window and the lantern on the side, with the roof's overhang prominent.
attribute_roof_type: conical thatched roof with wide overhangs, constructed from straw or similar material
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small, rectangular windows with wooden frames and crossbars, asymmetrically placed on adjacent sides of the cabin
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, accompanied by a lantern on the left side
